text.title: Outcome Based Roadmaps Advanced Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Outcome Based Roadmaps Advanced end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: capture-goal
step.action: Restate business goal with metric, current, target, deadline.

step.name: decompose-outcomes
step.action: Generate 2-4 product outcomes with causal hypotheses.

step.name: design-experiments
step.action: List 2-4 experiments per outcome with pre-registered criteria.

step.name: apply-confidence
step.action: Label each with High/Med/Low/Exploring + promotion conditions.
